fileChanges.reason: Add root App Router metadata export for missing fields: title, description, canonical, openGraph.title, openGraph.description, openGraph.url, openGraph.type, twitter.card, twitter.title, twitter.description.
fileChanges.diff:
--- src/app/layout.tsx
+++ src/app/layout.tsx
@@ -1,3 +1,30 @@
+import type { Metadata } from "next";
+
+export const metadata: Metadata = {
+  // TODO(shipready): Replace with the factual page title before applying.
+  title: "TODO: Page title",
+  // TODO(shipready): Replace with the factual page description before applying.
+  description: "TODO: Page description",
+  alternates: {
+    canonical: "http://127.0.0.1:55783/",
+  },
+  openGraph: {
+    // TODO(shipready): Replace with the factual Open Graph title before applying.
+    title: "TODO: Page title",
+    // TODO(shipready): Replace with the factual Open Graph description before applying.
+    description: "TODO: Page description",
+    url: "http://127.0.0.1:55783/",
+    type: "website",
+  },
+  twitter: {
+    card: "summary_large_image",
+    // TODO(shipready): Replace with the factual Twitter/X title before applying.
+    title: "TODO: Page title",
+    // TODO(shipready): Replace with the factual Twitter/X description before applying.
+    description: "TODO: Page description",
+  },
+};
+
 export default function RootLayout({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {
   return <html lang="en"><body>{children}</body></html>;
 }
